[33mUsage:[0m [32mdemo[0m [flags]

[33mFlags:[0m
  [32m-h[0m, [32m--help[0m       Show context-sensitive help.
  [32m-v[0m, [32m--verbose[0m    Enable verbose output.

[33mDatabase options:[0m
  [32m--host[0m="localhost"    Database host.
  [32m--port[0m=5432           Database port.
